name: p613-estimator-backend
description: SKSK ProTech - AI Auto Estimator Backend with Stripe

scripts.build: npm run install-rust && node scripts/build_router_v9.js && npm run build-rust
scripts.install-rust: if ! command -v cargo 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Installing Rust...' && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y && export PATH=
scripts.build-rust: && if command -v cargo 2>/dev/null; then cd tools/lemon_scraper && cargo build --release; else echo 'Cargo not found, skipping Rust build'; fi

author: Brian Shaffer
